title: neocheiropteris ningpoensis
intro: Neocheiropteris ningpoensis, a type of fern species, is a plant native to East Asia, particularly in China and Japan. The medicinal properties of Neocheiropteris ningpoensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and promoting wound healing. Traditionally, Neocheiropteris ningpoensis is prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and digestive problems.
